roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S NON-OPP DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOT TO VACATE PRIOR JUDGMENTS & CONVS FILED
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE CONVICTION, P & A, DEC, EXHIBITS FILED
DEFT'S SUPPLEMENTAL PETITION PREVIOUSLY FILED PC1203,4 FILED

/INTC/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THERIOR JUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 08-15-94 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTYPLEA TO A VIOLATION OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE VIOLATION 11352(A), ENTERED07-22-94, IS VACATED AND A NEW  PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 2, A MISDEMEANOR VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 32 IS GRANTED,/IRRC/FAWC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH2:CJ1D/CTS:1/VF2:150/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL PAY AN IMMEDIATE CRITICAL NEEDS ASSESSMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $300 PER CONVICTED COUNT PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 70373(A)/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A COURT OPERATIONS ASSESSMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $50 PER CONVICTED COUNT PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1465,8/CTORD: COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES IS PERMANENTLY SUSPENDED/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/NUNCDAT: 07-22-94/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,4 MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/X:ORAL MOTION PURSUANT TO HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11594 IS GRANTED,/X: ORDER TO RELIEVE DUTY TO REGISTER UNDER HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11590 PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11594 ISSIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/X:ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/
SPN INT SW-CASTANEDA/A;AJW/ISS;PROB3Y/PJ1Y/CTS68D/WS/11590/RX/DTCFINE;$500/VF1/PSR/PC/LF/CC W/SCN#144017/NOT ENT US ILLEGALLY & REL TO INS
